overview.quote: "Who's a good girl?"
overview.descriptionHtml: Cassandra Carlton (Cassie) Cage debuted in the  Mortal Kombat X. She is the only daughter of Johnny Cage and Sonya Blade. Also, Cassie is the main character of the ICC storyline. She is the leader of a new squad created by Johnny Cage
overview.descriptionText: Cassandra Carlton (Cassie) Cage debuted in the  Mortal Kombat X. She is the only daughter of Johnny Cage and Sonya Blade. Also, Cassie is the main character of the ICC storyline. She is the leader of a new squad created by Johnny Cage
overview.bioHtml:
Cassie Cage is the daughter of Sonya Blade and, as you probably guessed, Johnny Cage. She decides to follow her mother's path and enroll in the special forces. On Raiden's instructions, she gathers a new team of fighters to protect Earth from Shinnok, because old heroes are aging. With new fighters, she participates in special operations both in the Earth Kingdom and outside.

First, she saves her father Johnny Cage and defeats Shinnok. She then participates in the attack on Kronika's stronghold, who was the guardian of time and rescues Liu Kang. Through victory and gaining the special strength of her father, she manages to bring her mother back to life. After that, she resigns from the post of SWAT commander, refusing to become the new keeper of time.

overview.bioHtml: Cetrion is an Elder Goddess, sister to Shinnok, and Daugther of Kronika. She was one of the deities responsible for Shinnok's banishing to the Netherrealm. Her core beliefs center on keeping balance in the world. But beyond that, she will always be loyal to ger mother Kronika. She went as far as to betray other Elder Gods to help further Kronikas plan for a New Era. A pursuit that would eventually weaken her.

overview.descriptionText: A collection of bugs with sharp appendages and a brutal conviction to survive, D'vorah is an intriguing character in the franchise. Originally she is a part of Mortal Kombat X.
overview.bioHtml:
The Kytinn are an insect-like species that group together to form a humanoid form. When Shao Khan conquered the Arnyek Islands, in the Outworld, D'vorah pledged her loyalty to his empire. Eventually, she would serve under Kotal Khan amidst the civil war kicked off by Mileena.

Though she is below the command of others, she does so as a survival strategy. She understood that she could willingly join Shao Khan or do so unwillingly and become a slave under him.

overview.descriptionText: Rugged Gunslinger, a cowboy outside of his time. Antiaging magic. Voiced by an icon of the gaming industry, Troy Baker. His quips and general cowboy mannerism has made him stand out among what is arguably an already very diverse roster.
overview.bioHtml:
Erron Black was born in 19th Century Texas. Working as a gunslinger in the states. Eventually, sorcerer Shang Tsung hired him to eliminate an Earthrealm warrior. Part of that agreement included providing Erron with magic to slow down his aging. Thus allowing the gunslinger to live for well over 150 years. Eventually, he would enter the service of Kotal Kahn.

Erron's gun-wielding style of fighting can keep opponents awake at night. His long lifespan has also allowed the outlaw to develop some incredibly gunslinging skills.

overview.quote: Kronika sees my true potential.
overview.descriptionHtml: A former apprentice of Sub-Zero. Frost let her ego get the better of her and fall into the hands of Kronika, who promised her power beyond anything she had seen before.
overview.descriptionText: A former apprentice of Sub-Zero. Frost let her ego get the better of her and fall into the hands of Kronika, who promised her power beyond anything she had seen before.
overview.bioHtml:
Once an apprentice of Sub-Zero, It quickly became apparent that Frost was a talented individual. Her ego eventually outgrew her skills and she left behind her training with Sub-Zero after feeling she was not receiving the recognition she deserved.

In an alternative timeline, Kronika discovered Frost's talents and tempted her with promises of leading the Lin Kuei to join her ranks. As part of that deal, Frost went through a thorough process of converting her to a cyborg.

overview.bioHtml: Lord Fujin, Raiden's younger brother, left the Sky Temple to live among humans. In his time among mortals, Fujin became more sympathetic to humans. As he was empathetic of Jax's pain over his failures. Raiden feared that Fujin would grow weaker as a result of these newfound sentiments for humans. Even coming to blows with him in what Fujin said was the only time they fought.

overview.descriptionHtml: Jackson Briggs has been part of almost every single entry in the Mortal Kombat Franchise. And he has been portrayed by over a dozen voice actors and models. He is a hardened soldier with a heart of gold and muscles
overview.descriptionText: Jackson Briggs has been part of almost every single entry in the Mortal Kombat Franchise. And he has been portrayed by over a dozen voice actors and models. He is a hardened soldier with a heart of gold and muscles
overview.bioHtml:
Major Jackson "Jax" Briggs is a member of the Outer World Investigation Agency (OIA) from the United States of America. He has undergone various Cybernetic enhancements. After years of service, and after being killed and brought back to life, he retired and formed a family.

Alas, his peaceful and quiet life would not last. His daughter, Jacqui, would follow his path and join the OIA. He would also lose her wife. After many pains and traumas, Kronika tempts him with the possibility of resetting the timeline and giving him another chance to steer his daughter away from the military and potentially save his wife.

overview.descriptionText: Jonathan Carlton (Johnny Cage) - father, actor, hero, commandos, and husband, shows and proves by personal example how important it is to participate in raising his own children because his daughter saved him from imprisonment.
overview.bioHtml:
Johnny Cage is one of the most famous characters in Mortal Kombat. He appeared in the MK universe back in 1992. The action movie actor Jean-Claude Van Damme was a prototype for Johnny. Like him, Cage is an actor. At first, he views the Mortal Kombat tournament as a joke. Even after 2 victories against the emperor's minions from Outworld, he still does not take the situation seriously. However, Raiden manages to convince him to defend Earth.

Many people remember his spectacular disappearance right from the set. He fights in the same squad with his wife and daughter. Like many of the Earth's defenders, he came under a deadly attack but was brought back to life. Johnny Cage took part in the Battle of the Pyramid of Argus. He was rescued by his daughter Cassie, who beat him off in a showdown against Shinnok.

overview.quote: I'm your worst nightmare.
overview.descriptionHtml: A hardened united states special forces veteran. An expert at survival, close quarter combat, and guerrilla warfare.
overview.descriptionText: A hardened united states special forces veteran. An expert at survival, close quarter combat, and guerrilla warfare.
overview.bioHtml:
A Vietnam Veteran. John Rambo is a part Italian from his father and part Najavo from his mother. At the young age of 17, he enlisted in the united states Army. In September 1966, he was deployed to South Vietnam and returned to be trained for the US special forces a year later. In 1969 he was deployed once again, this time as part of the SOG, specifically a Special Forces Long-range reconnaissance patrol unit. 

In 71' his unit was attacked by local forces and captured. Tortured and killed for over a year. Rambo and Delmar were the only ones to escape in may of 72'. Even though this traumatic experience, Rambo would continue his service until being discharged in 1974.

Attempting to rejoin civilian life proved a challenge for the veteran. As public perception of his and other soldiers, deeds were highly criticized. Pair with his traumatic experiences, he developed Post Traumatic Stress disorders causing him to lash out to those around him.

overview.bioHtml:
Kabal is a man of two destinies. Originally a Black Dragon member, he was very much a force of, at the very least, not good in the realms. Even going as far as to work with Shao Khan. But he would eventually leave that life behind and attempt to atone for his wrongdoings by becoming a police officer.

In a different time, he was always on the side of goodness. Though not necessarily due to a burning passion for justice. Thus still able to be corrupted by Kano and manipulated into doing evil. Nevertheless, he did at one point help Liu Kang and Kitana maintain peace over the Netherrealm.

overview.descriptionText: Kitana is a highly trained fighter who wields steel fans. She is a master in the art of fighting and develops these skills throughout her life. She is a lover of truth and eventually learns the truth
overview.bioHtml:
Kitana is the daughter of the rulers of Edenia, King Jerrod, and queen Sindel. She was too young when Shao Kahn took over her homeworld and apparently did not remember it. She grew up as a loyal hitman for the one who destroyed her parents.

The turning point in her fate was the task to prevent the Earth defense team from winning in Mortal Kombat. In the process of completing this task, she discovers the truth about what her boss actually did to her parents and her homeworld (planet). After that, she changes her life and secretly sets herself the goal of defeating Shao Kahn. Subsequently, with the help of the team from Earth and especially Liu Kang, she succeeds. In the process, she saves her mother and her homeworld, Edenia. She offers Liu Kang to stay with her on Edenia, but he refuses, saying that he has to protect the Earth.

overview.descriptionHtml: Kotal native name is Ko'atal. His Khan title was inherited after defeating Shao Khan.
overview.descriptionText: Kotal native name is Ko'atal. His Khan title was inherited after defeating Shao Khan.
overview.bioHtml:
Son of the former emperor of the Osh-Tekk people, Kotal served under Shao Khan after the invasion of the realm of the Osh-Tekk. After Shao Khan's death, Kotal overthrew Mileena's reign and became the emperor of the outworld. He would focus much more on the internal affairs of the realm, choosing to not continue the expansionist wishes of Shao Khan.

Earlier in his life, Kotal spent a lot of time among the Mayan people, protecting them from the Spanish conquest. For this, he would be revered as a god. But this religious zeal would eventually inflict suffering on the earthlings, as blood sacrifices were harmful to them.

overview.bioHtml: A Shaolin monk seeking to fill the shoes of a great ancestor, Kung Lao trained under Bo' Rai Cho as part of the Earthrealm warriors. Often Kung Lao lacks the discipline and concentration of his peers, and such comes across as an immature and reckless Shaolin. Many of these acts share a deeper root. One of insecurities and pressure to be as great as his ancestors.

overview.descriptionHtml: Liu Kang is the central character of the entire universe of Mortal Kombat. He saves all of humanity from enslavement. He won the main battle. He lost his life. He returned from "the other side". Liu Kang is very ascetic, kind, and calm
overview.descriptionText: Liu Kang is the central character of the entire universe of Mortal Kombat. He saves all of humanity from enslavement. He won the main battle. He lost his life. He returned from "the other side". Liu Kang is very ascetic, kind, and calm
overview.bioHtml:
Liu Kang is the main character of Mortal Kombat. This is a Shaolin monk who entered the decisive tenth tournament of Mortal Kombat for Earth. He defeated Shao Kahn's servants and actually saved the Earth from capture. He was killed, but then his body was returned to him by the Lord of lightning Raiden. His spirit returned to his body and Liu Kang again stood up to protect the Earth.

In the fight against the cruel emperor of the Outworld, he helped liberate other worlds as well. For this, the heroine of Edenia Kitana offered Liu Kang to stay with her, but he decided to remain the protector of the Earth.
overview.bioText:
Liu Kang is the main character of Mortal Kombat. This is a Shaolin monk who entered the decisive tenth tournament of Mortal Kombat for Earth. He defeated Shao Kahn's servants and actually saved the Earth from capture. He was killed, but then his body was returned to him by the Lord of lightning Raiden. His spirit returned to his body and Liu Kang again stood up to protect the Earth. 
In the fight against the cruel emperor of the Outworld, he helped liberate other worlds as well. For this, the heroine of Edenia Kitana offered Liu Kang to stay with her, but he decided to remain the protector of the Earth.

overview.quote: Let us dance!
overview.descriptionHtml: For most intents and purposes, Mileena is the undisputed queen of the outworld, and maybe the whole Mortal Kombat franchise.
overview.descriptionText: For most intents and purposes, Mileena is the undisputed queen of the outworld, and maybe the whole Mortal Kombat franchise.
overview.bioHtml:
Mileena is one of the adopted daughters of Shao Khan. She eventually underwent genetic experiments at the hands of Shang Tsung. These mutations mixed Mileena's Edenian genes with those of the Tarkatan. This transformed her into a hybrid with incredible strength and ferocity. Mileena would eventually come to rule the outworld when her father, Shao Khan, died. However, her reign was not as long as his thanks to a coup set in motion by some of Shao Khan's conquered realms.

She is cruel and unforgiving. Ready to murder for the sheer pleasure of it. She very much exists as an antagonist to Kitana.

overview.descriptionHtml: Nightwolf (Grey Cloud) is, at a glance, a very stereotypical Native American hero, but throughout the various games, he has developed into a more nuanced and interesting character. Particularly with his interactions with Raiden.
overview.descriptionText: Nightwolf (Grey Cloud) is, at a glance, a very stereotypical Native American hero, but throughout the various games, he has developed into a more nuanced and interesting character. Particularly with his interactions with Raiden.
overview.bioHtml:
Nightwolf appears in Mortal Kombat as the one who teaches Liu Kang. He taught his student how to use Animality. He also assisted Liu Kang as the Mortal Kombat universe's protagonist in passing trials to get a chance to fight and defeat Shao Kahn.

He comes from the Lakota-Sioux tribe and calls him Raiden as Haokah. In Mortal Kombat 11 it became known that at the moment his tribe is called Matoka.

Nightwolf travels with his tamed Kiba wolf, who helps him use the shaman's powers. As you might guess, this character also knows how to communicate with wolves and, perhaps, considers them his friends.

 

Nightwolf probably didn't have these skills from birth. The name "Night Wolf" is a title that is passed from person to person in the Matoka Indian Tribe. It was this title that gave this native American his superpower.

A historian and shaman well in tune with nature. He has allied with Raiden to protect Earthrealm from those who seek to destroy it, conquer it, or even something worse.

overview.descriptionText: "This guy is wearing a cool hat." Raiden is one of the oldest characters in Mortal Kombat. He is equally good at lightning and striking eyes. He defeats multi-armed warriors with hands behind his back, helps friends, and knows a thing about amulets
overview.bioHtml:
Raiden is one of the most powerful characters in Mortal Kombat according to the history of this universe. He protects the Earth from various dangers. He first saved people when one of his "fellow Olympians" Shinnok went mad and decided to enslave the human world. Thanks to a powerful amulet, Raiden managed to thwart his comrade's plans and defeat him.

After some time, he had to participate in Mortal Kombat in the guise of a mere mortal in order to stop Shang Tsung's army. In the same battle, he defeated Goro, who won 9 out of 10 Mortal Kombat tournaments.

In general, he is engaged in saving the Earth from this or that super-being. It was successful.

overview.descriptionHtml: Alex James Murphy, aka Crime Prevention Unit 001, aka RoboCop. Half machine half men. A cult classic of the late eighties cinema. Originally portrayed by Peter Weller, who reprised the role for Mortal Kombat's 11 version of the iconic figure.
overview.descriptionText: Alex James Murphy, aka Crime Prevention Unit 001, aka RoboCop. Half machine half men. A cult classic of the late eighties cinema. Originally portrayed by Peter Weller, who reprised the role for Mortal Kombat's 11 version of the iconic figure.
overview.bioHtml:
OCP Crime Prevention Unit 001, or RoboCop. He is a cybernetically enhanced Detroit police officer from Murfreesboro, Tennessee. After being killed in action. Murphy is given a second life as a cyborg for the megacorporation OCP, Omni Consumer Products. The corporation took over the Detroit Police Department.

After his death, the OCP seizes control of his remains. Using what little there is left of Murphy after a shootout with crime boss Clarence Boddicker, they resemble him in what he is now, RoboCop.

RoboCop goes on to unmask a conspiracy from the head of the RoboCop Program, Dick Jones, that aimed to pitch law enforcement and the crime bosses of Detroit for profit. After learning of this he attempts to confront and arrest Jones. But due to his programming is unable to arrest any senior employee of the OCP. In a high stakes situation where the CEO of OCP, "Old Man", fires Jones after he is taken hostage by Jones after RoboCop once again confronts him in an executive meeting. RoboCop, now freed from "directive 4" which prevented him from harming Jones. Kills him, earning the trust of "Old Man".

A year later, the OCP attempted to create another RoboCop Unit. After many failed attempts and an attack on RoboCop that leaves him reconstructed but with mounting programmed directives that limit his abilities. An Old Detroit drug lord, Cain, who orchestrated the attack on Murphy, is believed to be fit for the program thanks to his unparalleled megalomania. As most other subjects had taken their own life after being transformed into new RoboCop units.

The OCP succeeded in making Cain a new Robocop, but Cain's addiction to a drug called Nuke eventually was his undoing. As Lewis, RoboCop's partner was able to bait him with a vial of the drug giving Murphy a widow to kill Cain.

Years later, the OCP financial situation became strenuous. A new plan was devised to relocate many of the residents of Cadillac Heights for gentrification. The plan eventually backfired. RoboCop was able to record Paul McDaggett, who was heading the relocation of residents and broadcasted the tape for all to hear. After the police moved away from the OCP to assist the resistance of Cadillac Height. A big confrontation with the OCP started which came to end after RoboCop came down into the scene powered by a jet pack.

overview.quote: I let go my rage, and it saved me
overview.descriptionHtml: Scorpion is the iconic MK character. His fiery persona and mean-looking figure typecasted him to antagonist or harden badass roles. But since his original release, he has slowly crept up into the good camp as more information is available of him.
overview.descriptionText: Scorpion is the iconic MK character. His fiery persona and mean-looking figure typecasted him to antagonist or harden badass roles. But since his original release, he has slowly crept up into the good camp as more information is available of him.
overview.bioHtml:
A lost soul seeking revenge for his family. Hanzo was born to the Shirai Ryu clan. His father tried to keep him from becoming an assassin, but his efforts would be unsuccessful. Scorpion secured himself a good life with his bloody line of work. But he would not be at peace. Another clan would attack him and exterminate them all. Scorpion would then come back to earth as a Hellspawn seeking revenge.

Enraged by Quan Chi's lies, Hanzo killed Bi-Han from the rival Lin Kuei Clan in the first Tournament. This event spawned the undead wraith Noob Saibot. Still, Scorpion is ultimately good or at least seeks to do good.

overview.descriptionHtml: Shao Kahn (Shao Khan) is one of the first bosses in the Mortal Kombat fighting game series. In the new parts of the series, he periodically becomes available as a regular playable character.
overview.descriptionText: Shao Kahn (Shao Khan) is one of the first bosses in the Mortal Kombat fighting game series. In the new parts of the series, he periodically becomes available as a regular playable character.
overview.bioHtml: Shao Kahn is one of the main negative characters in the Mortal Kombat series of games, the emperor of Outworld (his name is often misspelled, like Shao Kahn. In many respects, he has similarities with Asian generals of the Middle Ages (helmet and clothing), personifies evil in many manifestations. Kahn is known for his power as a god, extreme cruelty, and rudeness towards his enemies and towards allies, but he managed to rise above a simple commander solely due to his intellectual abilities. Shao Kahn's strengths are his enormous willpower to achieve his goals and his ability to organize, while his weaknesses are his arrogance and self-confidence.

overview.descriptionHtml: Sheeva stands at 6'8" ft (203.2m) tall. She has a muscular and potent build capable of ripping her opponents apart. Sheeva has been a part of the Mortal Kombat Franchise for decades and continues to be one of the most morally interesting characters.
overview.descriptionText: Sheeva stands at 6'8" ft (203.2m) tall. She has a muscular and potent build capable of ripping her opponents apart. Sheeva has been a part of the Mortal Kombat Franchise for decades and continues to be one of the most morally interesting characters.
overview.bioHtml:
Sheeva is part of the ancient race of the Shokan. Four armed half-humans half-dragons from the Outworld. As with all other members of her species. She is tall, muscular, and with three digits in each hand and two big toes in each foot.

Sheeva was one of the personal bodyguards to Queen Sindel amid the Earthrealm invasion. Later she became the queen of the Shokan after Goro's father's death.

Sheeva's principal concerns surround the Shokan race. She has multiple times betrayed or conspired against enemies and allies alike to ensure the safety and prosperity of her species.

overview.bioHtml:
Sonya is the acting general of the Earthrealm's special forces. After Shinnok's defeat, she became romantically involved with Johnny Cage and had a daughter. Cassie Cage.

She would lead an assault on Liu Kang's domains alongside Raiden, Johnny, and Cassie. While fighting, she would become entrapped in the crumbling castle and detonate planted explosives to destroy the army of the Netherrealm.

Kronika would then bring a younger version of Sonya into the present and a younger version of Johnny and Jax.

overview.quote: I'm beyond redemption
overview.descriptionHtml: A Comics superhero from the early 90', Spawn was a solo Comic for Image Comics. His demonic aesthetics gave him mild popularity in his original release. Peaking in 1997 with a feature film and earning a top-selling spot in May of the same year.
overview.descriptionText: A Comics superhero from the early 90', Spawn was a solo Comic for Image Comics. His demonic aesthetics gave him mild popularity in his original release. Peaking in 1997 with a feature film and earning a top-selling spot in May of the same year.
overview.bioHtml:
Albert Francis "Al" Simmons, a Lieutenant in the US Marine Corps turn Secret Service agent and eventually working for the CIA. Later in life, he became part of a US Security Group lead by Jason Wynn.

He would eventually want to retire, a decision that would cost him his life as his former work partner Bruce "Chapel" Stinson was tasked with his assassination.

Due to his life as an assassin, Simmons' soul went to Hell where he struck a deal with the demon lord Malebolgia to lead Malebolgia's army of Hell in exchange for seeing his wife Wanda Blake again. A Simmons, lacking his memories and in a disfigured body, he discovered that Wanda had remarried a close friend of his, Terrance Fitzgerald. Conceiving a daughter, Cyan Fitzgerald. 

Spawn, as Simmons would call himself, fought the forces of Heaven and Hell. Eventually, he would battle Satan and God himself.

overview.quote: You probably saved my life.
overview.descriptionHtml:
Sub-Zero is one of the most famous characters in the Mortal Kombat universe. This COOL guy, a ninja who knows the art of freezing everything and everyone around. Flying ice - who has not seen this?

He definitely has no problem with the heat.
overview.descriptionText:
Sub-Zero is one of the most famous characters in the Mortal Kombat universe. This COOL guy, a ninja who knows the art of freezing everything and everyone around. Flying ice - who has not seen this?

He definitely has no problem with the heat.
overview.bioHtml:
In the Mortal Kombat universe, there were originally two brothers (the younger Kuai Liang and the elder Bi-Han) Sub-Zero. The elder participated in MK I. He received orders from the head of the assassin clan, The Lin Kuei, to assassinate the Mortal Kombat “tournament manager” Shang Tsung. The elder brother did not succeed in doing this, he was killed by Scorpion, who, in turn, wanted to achieve revenge. After death, elder Sub-Zero becomes evil (Noob Saibot).

In the next part - Mortal Kombat II, the younger Sub-Zero enters the battle.

In the direct sequel to Mortal Kombat II, Bi-Han is replaced by his brother Kuai Liang. He is sent to the tournament after the death of his elder brother. The assignment is all the same - to kill Shang Tsung.

He was then forced to flee and leave his clan The Lin Kuei due to the fact that the leaders decided to turn all the Assassins into cyborgs. 3 cyborgs were sent in pursuit of him, but they failed to kill the younger Sub-Zero. Earlier, he received a vision from Raiden and agreed to join the defense of the Earth.

overview.quote: Hasta la vista, baby; I’ll be back
overview.descriptionHtml: T-800 is a cyborg created to destroy a leader of humanity's resistance for the rebellious military-industrial artificial intelligence. Subsequently, with the help of unknown hackers, his "brother" is reprogrammed and helped to save humankind
overview.descriptionText: T-800 is a cyborg created to destroy a leader of humanity's resistance for the rebellious military-industrial artificial intelligence. Subsequently, with the help of unknown hackers, his "brother" is reprogrammed and helped to save humankind
overview.bioHtml:
The Terminator T-800 is one of the robots created by the rebellious US artificial intelligence Skynet. He was probably created at one of the factories of the American military-industrial complex to destroy the resistance of the people to the world tyranny spreading across the globe. In the first part, he was sent "into the past" to find and kill Sarah Connor. Thanks to the desperate resistance of the girl and her protector, the Terminator failed to complete this mission, and he was destroyed. However, his processor was found by scientists and then became the basis for the creation of artificial intelligence Skynet.

Another terminator of the same model was reprogrammed by the resistance and sent into the past in order to protect Sarah Connor's child from another robot. The Terminator T-800 coped with this task successfully.

overview.quote: Can You Introduce Me As Joker?
overview.descriptionHtml: A crazy clown who wanted to assert himself at the expense of the whole city. At the same time, he is quite purposeful, cunning and ironic. Owns melee techniques. His jokes are not funny.
overview.descriptionText: A crazy clown who wanted to assert himself at the expense of the whole city. At the same time, he is quite purposeful, cunning and ironic. Owns melee techniques. His jokes are not funny.
overview.bioHtml:
According to the generally accepted version, the unfortunate comedian became the Joker when he participated in the robbery of a factory. Frightened by the guards, he fell into acid and went mad. At the same time, a forced smile froze on his face.

The Joker performed atrocities until he was stopped. He was detained in a psychiatric hospital.

The Joker did not want to know the truth about his former self. It is very likely that he was kept in the hospital not as in prison but because he is indeed mentally ill.

Until now, no one knows how and why the Joker joined the ranks of the Earth's defenders in Mortal Kombat.
